bead.title: Validate benchmark lanes against profile files
bead.description:
Problem
loadSweepPlan currently validates recipe lane references, but it does not validate that each lane.profile_id has a matching scripts/benchmark/profiles/<profile_id>.yaml profile, that the profile id matches the lane profile_id, or that key plan/profile dimensions agree. This allowed fiz-vidar-ds4-mtp to be committed with profile_id=vidar-ds4-mtp while no profile file existed.

In scope
- cmd/bench/sweep.go and cmd/bench/sweep_test.go, or a narrow helper under cmd/bench, to validate lane/profile consistency when loading a sweep plan.
- Validation should cover: every lane profile_id exists; profile.id equals the lane profile_id; lane fizeau_env provider/model/base_url/api_key_env agree with the loaded profile provider fields when both are present; lane resource_group exists; and comparison group references remain valid.
- Error messages must name the lane id, profile id, and missing/mismatched field.

Out of scope
- Creating profiles or changing lane schema.
- Live endpoint probes; preflight already handles runtime liveness.
bead.acceptance:
1. `go test ./cmd/bench -run TestLoadSweepPlanRejectsLaneWithoutProfile -count=1` passes with a fixture or test plan that reproduces the fiz-vidar-ds4-mtp missing-profile failure.
2. `go test ./cmd/bench -run TestLoadSweepPlanRejectsLaneProfileMismatch -count=1` passes and names the mismatched field in the error.
3. `go test ./cmd/bench -run TestLoadSweepPlan -count=1` passes against scripts/benchmark/terminalbench-2-1-sweep.yaml.
4. `go test ./cmd/bench -count=1` passes.
